author: lOrm
content: Replaced if/else chain in determine_provider with typed ProviderKind enum (src/providers/mod.rs:132). 5 tests: provider_kind_name_round_trip, provider_kind_from_model_known_prefixes, provider_kind_from_model_unknown_returns_unknown_variant, provider_kind_from_model_is_case_insensitive, provider_kind_from_model_no_false_positive_on_o_prefix (o100→Unknown). cargo test --lib: 1252 passed. cargo clippy --all-targets --all-features: exit 0.
